titleStmt.title: SII 41.257: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 257. (A.R. No. 475 of 1905.) Tiruvālaṅgāḍu, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the north wall of the first prakārā of the Naṭarājaśvamin shrine in the Vaṭāranēśvara temple at Tiruvālaṅgāḍu.

summary.p: Mutilated. Beginning portion of the inscription is missing. Mentions a sale of 500 kuḻi of tax exempted land by the temple trustees to one Malligārjinadēvar for 250 paṇam to provide food offerings.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Aññūṟṟukkum Iṟaiili caṟuvamāṉṉiyam Āka vilaiāka niṟceytta paṇam 2 100 5 10ippaṇam Irunūṟṟu Aympatukkum vilai Āṉa kuḻi Añnūṟukku varum kaṭamai poṉvari Uḷḷatu tamakku nāṅkaḷ vilai Āka vilaipramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttu Inta paṇam Irunūṟṟuaympatum kiḻikaiccilavaṟa paṟṟikkoṇṭom Intakuḻi Aññūṟṟil Uṇṭāṉa Irupūmuppū viḷainta kaṭamai poṉvari Uḷḷatu Uṭaiyār tiruvālaṅkāṭuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku mattiāṉakālattuccantikku
m Antikkālattu cantikkum Āka nāḷ Oṉṟukku canti Iraṇṭukku Amutupaṭi kuṟuṇiyum kaṟi Amutu tayir Amutukku kācu Iraṇṭum Āḻākku neyyum Āka nāḷ toṟum Uṭaiavarai Amutu ceyya paṇṇi Inta prasātattil tāṉattār peṟum prasātam nāṉāḻiyum mallukāṟcciṉar tevar peṟum prasātam nāṉāḻiyum Ikkoyil tevaraṭiyāḷ Ariyavaḷ makaḷ Ammaiappanācci peṟakkaṭavaḷ Ākavum Intacanti cantiṟātittavaraiyum
naṭatta kaṭavom Ākavum nāṅkaḷ Inta Iraṇṭu cantikkum Inta kuḻi Aññūṟṟukku varum vāram kaṭamai poṉvari Uḷḷatu tāṉattile kaikkoṇṭu Intaccanti cantiṟātittavaraiyum naṭattakkaṭavom Ākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu Iṟaiili vilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom mallukāṟcciṉa tevarkku Uṭaiyār tiruvālaṅkāṭuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tāṉattārom Ippaṭikku kūḻāṇṭār vakai Iraṇṭukku Ivai kūḻāṇṭār Eḻuttu Ivai kūḻāṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu
tevakaṉmiyaḷ vakai Iraṇṭukku Ivai tirucciṟṟampalam paṭṭar Eḻuttu Ivai jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻapaṭṭar Eḻuttu Ivai caṅkarapaṭṭar Eḻuttu Ivai tiruvālaṅkāṭapaṭṭar Eḻuttu Ivai puḻutipaṭṭar Eḻuttu Ivai vipūtipūṣaṇapaṭṭar Eḻuttu Ivai keṅkātarapaṭṭar Eḻuttu koyilkkaṇakku vakai Iraṇṭukku Ikkoyil kaṇakku Uttaraṉpeṭuṭaiyāṉ Ammaiappaṉ Ammaiappaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ikkoyil kaṇakku perumputūr
ṉa Ammaiappa veḷāṉ Eḻuttu § śrīmākeheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 41.257 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
